response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: embedded LAN-switch firmware, C for UNIX development as a primary skill, Linux kernel source modification, or security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, and Captive Portal. Critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is a hard requirement and the candidate lists only English, Romanian, and basic German. The skill set leans heavily toward TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and platform work rather than embedded networking security.
strengths: Long track record of professional software development (15+ years) across diverse stacks
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a C IDE product
concerns: Does not meet the hard requirement of native-level Japanese language proficiency
No demonstrated experience with embedded networking, LAN switches, MACsec, 802.1X, or Linux kernel modification
C is not a primary or recent skill; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and web-focused

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / switch security experience
Limited recent C / Linux kernel work
